skill.name: maxhub-threads
skill.description: Threads data query assistant. Covers post details, user profiles, search, comments, reposts, and more.
skill.summary: Query Threads social media data using natural language through the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: All 87 static findings are false positives for this legitimate Threads API client skill. The skill requires MAXHUB_API_KEY for authentication, executes curl commands to query the MaxHub API, and makes network requests to aconfig.cn. These behaviors are inherent to the skill's intended function as a data API assistant. No evidence of malicious intent, credential exfiltration, or prompt injection was found.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Key
low_findings.description: The skill reads MAXHUB_API_KEY from the environment for API authentication. This is required for the skill to function as a data API client. The skill includes instructions to keep API key values out of output.

low_findings.title: External Command Execution via curl
low_findings.description: The skill instructs the AI to execute curl commands for making API requests to the MaxHub service. This is the intended method for querying Threads data through the API. All command arguments use documented and fixed parameters.

low_findings.title: Network Requests to External API Service
low_findings.description: The skill sends HTTP requests to https://www.aconfig.cn to query Threads data. This is the core functionality of the skill. The base URL and all endpoint paths are documented and fixed.

content.user_title: Query Threads Data with Natural Language Commands
content.value_statement: Finding and analyzing Threads social media data requires manual searching through multiple profiles and posts. This skill lets you search posts, profiles, and trends using natural language through the MaxHub API.
actual_capabilities: Fetch detailed information about any Threads post by ID or URL
Search and view user profiles with follower counts and verification status
Retrieve comments, replies, and reposts for any Threads post
Search recent and top posts across Threads using keywords
Support queries in both English and Chinese with localized number formatting
Classify queries into browse, analyze, or compare modes for structured results
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key configured as MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable
Data freshness depends on the MaxHub API caching layer and may be delayed
Cannot post, like, follow, or interact with Threads content in any way
Limited to documented API endpoints for querying posts and user data

use_cases.title: Monitor Brand Mentions on Threads
use_cases.description: Search for brand-related keywords on Threads and analyze post engagement, user sentiment, and trending discussions around your brand.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and brand analysts

use_cases.title: Research Social Media Trends
use_cases.description: Gather data on trending topics, popular profiles, and discussion patterns on Threads for market research and competitive analysis reports.

use_cases.title: Research Audience and Competition
use_cases.description: Search for creator and competitor profiles on Threads, analyze follower engagement metrics, and identify content opportunities.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media strategists

prompt_templates.title: Look Up a Post by URL
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the Threads post at https://www.threads.com/@username/post/ABC123.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick lookup of a single post using its full URL

prompt_templates.title: Search for User Profiles
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Threads profiles related to technology news.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding relevant profiles by keyword search

prompt_templates.title: Get Post with Comments Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the post from https://www.threads.com/@username/post/ABC123 and summarize the top comments.
prompt_templates.scenario: Analyzing a post and its community response

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Endpoint Trend Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for recent posts about AI and analyze the top profiles discussing this topic.
prompt_templates.scenario: Cross-referencing multiple endpoints for deeper insights

output: Post by taylorswift (Taylor Swift) - Verified account
Content: Thank you to all the fans for an incredible tour

output_examples.input: Find profiles related to artificial intelligence on Threads

best_practices: Configure your MAXHUB_API_KEY before starting any queries to avoid authentication errors
Use specific keywords and post URLs for more accurate and relevant search results
Request data in English or Chinese for properly localized number formatting and responses
anti_patterns: Sharing your MAXHUB_API_KEY value in conversation output or with other users
Requesting data from endpoints that are not documented in the skill API reference
Assuming real-time data without checking the cache_url field in API responses

faq.question: What API does this skill use to access Threads data?
faq.answer: This skill uses the MaxHub API at https://www.aconfig.cn to query Threads data. It is not an official Meta product.

faq.question: Do I need to pay for the MaxHub API?
faq.answer: You need a MaxHub account and API key. Visit https://www.aconfig.cn to sign up and get your key.

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports both English and Chinese queries and responses. Number formats adjust automatically.

faq.question: Can this skill post content or interact on Threads?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only and can only query existing posts, profiles, comments, and reposts.

faq.question: How current is the data returned by the API?
faq.answer: Data freshness depends on the MaxHub API caching layer. Some responses include a cache_url for reference.

faq.question: Is an internet connection required to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill makes live API calls to the MaxHub service and requires network access.
